eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Wheeler, OR; at 12:26 AM on JUL 16, 2026 Effective until 1:26 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Level 3 - GO NOW - Evacuate immediately from N of Dry Hollow & Rowe Cr, to Sugar Loaf Butte, W of Rowe Cr, E of Dry Hollow - Twickenham.
Nivel 3 - VAYASE AHORA - Evacue inmediatamente N of Dry Hollow & Rowe Cr, to Sugar Loaf Butte, W of Rowe Cr, E of Dry Hollow - Twickenham.
